meta.title: Craft Codex · Cabinetmaker — an open knowledge pool for the trades
meta.description: MR learning tool for woodworking: a parametric dovetail in 3D, master answers by voice (RAG, offline-proof), WebXR on Quest 3. Open source, MIT.

footer.metaLine: Craft Codex — an open knowledge pool for the trades · MIT license
footer.cybercraft: In the spirit of CyberCraft — Handcraft. Cybercraft. Supercraft.

systemStatus.offlineChain: Offline chain: cache → server → text. The demo never breaks.

corpus.label: Knowledge corpus
corpus.detail: {count} trade documents · local in your browser, always on

brain.label: Answer brain
brain.template: server up · template answers from the corpus
brain.offline: offline · the local corpus template takes over

voice.label: Voice
voice.cachedLive: {count} answers pre-voiced offline · server TTS live on top
voice.none: no audio · answers come as text

xr.label: WebXR
xr.none: this browser can't do XR · the 3D workshop still runs
